headline: Is Analog Devices, Inc. (ADI) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is ADI a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Analog Devices, Inc. on r/investing_discussion by Variant_Invest. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on ADI. Analog Devices, Inc.’s share was trading at $413.85 as of May 29th. ADI’s trailing and forward P/E were 61.58 and 33.78 respectively according to Yahoo […]
